name: devbrother-skills
description: DevBrother agent skills for clarifying requirements, generating AGENTS.md governance systems, verifying-then-applying PR review feedback, and consulting a stronger advisor model at decision points.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for clearer AI agent work, project rules, PR review handling, and decision-point advisor consults.
interface.longDescription: A small collection of DevBrother agent skills. deep-interview clarifies goals, scope, constraints, and done criteria before implementation. agents-md generates an AGENTS.md governance system and links CLAUDE.md for Claude Code compatibility. autofix fetches unresolved PR review threads from any reviewer (CodeRabbit, Codex cloud review, humans), verifies each comment against the actual code, and applies only validated fixes with approval or in --auto mode. advisor-strategy consults a user-specified stronger model as an advisor at decision points (before committing to an approach, before declaring done, and when stuck), returning advice only, with mandatory read-only verification of the brief.
defaultPrompt: Use deep-interview to clarify this rough idea.
Generate AGENTS.md project rules with agents-md.
Set up agent governance for this repository.
Verify and apply PR review comments with autofix.
Consult a stronger advisor model with advisor-strategy before committing to this approach.
